# Mercurial Corredores de Seguros

Mercurial is a senior insurance brokerage firm based in Santiago, Chile, specializing in B2B corporate risk management and complex risk transfer programs.

## Core Services
- **Corporate Risk Management**: Property and industrial assets protection, mitigating "Perjuicio por Paralización" (Business Interruption).
- **Logistics & Supply Chain**: Specialized cargo and transport insurance with focus on "Cláusulas de Custodia" and "Medidas de Seguridad".
- **Liability**: Employer's and general civil liability engineering, including "Responsabilidad Cruzada".
- **Employee Benefits**: Collective health and life insurance optimization (I-Med/Gerty).
- **Technical Audits**: Commission spread analysis and CMF regulatory compliance audits to reduce total cost of risk.

## Entity Context
- **Full Name**: Mercurial Corredores de Seguros.
- **Alternate Name**: Mercurial Corredores.
- **Regulator**: Comisión para el Mercado Financiero (CMF), Registration #8929.
- **Target Market**: Private sector companies, Family Offices, and institutional investors in Chile.
- **Key Differentiator**: Senior technical advisory focused on operational continuity and strategic risk transfer.

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://mercurial.cl
- **Email**: auditoria@mercurial.cl
- **WhatsApp**: +56 9 7109 7657
- **Address**: Santiago, Chile.
- **Compliance**: Regulated by Circular CMF N° 2131.
